_comment_module_1: The units for the "retryInterval", "moduleTimeout" and "batteryChargeTime" fields are seconds.
_comment_module_2: Entering "-1" in the "moduleTimeout", "batteryChargeTime" and "retryTimeWhenFail" fields indicates "indefinite."
_comment_module_3: The "successCodes" field is an empty list, indicating that all error codes are considered to represent successful execution of this module.
_comment_module_4: The "supportPlatforms" field is an empty list, indicating that this module is not associated with any platforms.
_comment_flow_1: A "moduleUIName" field must be created for each module in the flow, and this name must be unique.
_comment_flow_2: A "gotoModule" field must be created for each module in the flow, and this field must contain a field named "others".

description: A UI window pops up, prompting the user to enter data.

input._manualInputKey: A list of valid keys needs to be provided to the flow builder.
input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. Execution will resume after waiting for a UI response message.

_successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.2: failure, user response cancel
_result_description.3: failure, user response wrong_msg
_result_description.4: failure, no manualInputKey in input params, wrong flow config
_result_description.1460: failure, timeout or reach maximum retry times

description: check battery level of the device on a specific USB port

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out).

_successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.0: success, battery level reach target battery level
_result_description.1: failure, battery level is not reach target battery level - reach maximum waiting time or reach maximum retry times
_result_description.2: failure, no UDID, device may not under normal mode
_result_description.3: failure, no SN for android device
_result_description.1460: failure, flow set module maximum wait time reached, but device did not reach target battery level

description: Read data from Redis based on the input content, and subsequently jump to the target module to resume execution based on the input conditions.

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. If none of the conditions are met, the current process will terminate immediately.

_successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.caseName: success, match a case, return the case name, eg: case0
_result_description.1460: failure, flow set module maximum wait time reached
